English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
George J. Hecht papers
Hecht, George J., 1895-1980.
3473
2.4 cubic feet. 2.4 cubic feet.
[ca. 1915]-1974. Correspondence, news clippings, and articles. Correspondence, news clippings, and articles relating to George J. Hecht (Cornell University Class of 1917). Correspondents of note include John Lovejoy Elliot of the Ethical Culture Society and the Hudson Guild, William DeForest, James G. Blain, and Senators Hubert Humphrey, Lister Hill, Cleveland Bailey, and Robert Kennedy. Also included are three taped interviews and transcripts, 1974. Collection material in English 2083986
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, September 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Publisher.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, news clippings, and articles relating to George J. Hecht (Cornell University Class of 1917). Correspondents of note include John Lovejoy Elliot of the Ethical Culture Society and the Hudson Guild, William DeForest, James G. Blain, and Senators Hubert Humphrey, Lister Hill, Cleveland Bailey, and Robert Kennedy. Also included are three taped interviews and transcripts, 1974.
COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
Subdivisions: 1. Personal correspondence and family life; 2. Social welfare work; 3. Education and educational legislation; 4. Hecht publications.Arranged chronologically within subdivisions.
COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
Subdivisions: 1. Personal correspondence and family life; 2. Social welfare work; 3. Education and educational legislation; 4. Hecht publications.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Personal Correspondence and Family Life
Series II. Social Welfare work
Series III. Education and Educational Legislation
Series IV. Hecht Publications
Series V. Miscellaneous Hecht Publications
Cite As:
George J. Hecht papers, #3473. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Publishers. Social service. Public welfare. Education. Bailey, Cleveland. Blain, James G. DeForest, William. Elliot, John Lovejoy. Hill, Lister, 1894- Humphrey, Hubert H. (Hubert Horatio), 1911-1978. Kennedy, Robert F., 1925-1968. Ethical Culture Society Hudson Guild
